div.h1: Stack Alignment Requirements (x86-64 System V ABI)
div.p: Constraint: The stack pointer (%rsp) must be 16-byte aligned at the moment a CALL instruction is executed.

ol.li: SSE Alignment: Instructions like MOVAPS require addresses to be 16-byte aligned. Misalignment triggers #GP Exception.

ul.li: Note: Misaligned for SSE ops which require 16B alignment.

g.title: Pushed by hardware. RSP is now 16n + 8
Pushed by hardware. RSP is now 16n + 8
